original: 7 . Kammakathā
content: 7.業的談論

original: 234. Ahosi kammaṃ, ahosi kammavipāko.
content: 234.既有業過去已有業的果報；

original: Ahosi kammaṃ, nāhosi kammavipāko.
content: 既有業過去未有業的果報；

original: Ahosi kammaṃ, atthi kammavipāko.
content: 既有業現有業的果報；

original: Ahosi kammaṃ, natthi kammavipāko.
content: 既有業現未有業的果報；

original: Ahosi kammaṃ, bhavissati kammavipāko.
content: 既有業將有業的果報；

original: Ahosi kammaṃ, na bhavissati kammavipāko.[ Atītakammaṃ]
content: 既有業將沒有過業的果報。[過去業]

original: Atthi kammaṃ, atthi kammavipāko.
content: 現有業現有業的果報；

original: Atthi kammaṃ, natthi kammavipāko.
content: 現有業現未有業的果報；

original: Atthi kammaṃ, bhavissati kammavipāko .
content: 現有業將有業的果報；

original: Atthi kammaṃ, na bhavissati kammavipāko.[ Paccuppannakammaṃ]
content: 現有業將沒有過業的果報。[現在業]

original: Bhavissati kammaṃ, bhavissati kammavipāko.
content: 將有業將有業的果報；

original: Bhavissati kammaṃ, na bhavissati kammavipāko.[ Anāgatakammaṃ]
content: 將有業將沒有業的果報。[未來業]

original: 235. Ahosi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, ahosi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 235.既有善業過去已有善業的果報；

original: Ahosi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, nāhosi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有善業過去未有善業的果報；

original: Ahosi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, atthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有善業現有善業的果報；

original: Ahosi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, natthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有善業現未有善業的果報；

original: Ahosi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有善業將有善業的果報；

original: Ahosi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有善業將沒有過善業的果報。

original: Atthi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, atthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有善業現有善業的果報；

original: Atthi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, natthi kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有善業現未有善業的果報；

original: Atthi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有善業將有善業的果報；

original: Atthi kusalaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有善業將沒有過善業的果報。

original: Bhavissati kusalaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 將有善業將有善業的果報；

original: Bhavissati kusalaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati kusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 將有善業將沒有善業的果報。

original: Ahosi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, ahosi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有不善業過去已有不善業的果報；

original: Ahosi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, nāhosi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有不善業過去未有不善業的果報；

original: Ahosi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, atthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有不善業現有不善業的果報；

original: Ahosi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, natthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有不善業現未有不善業的果報；

original: Ahosi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有不善業將有不善業的果報；

original: Ahosi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有不善業將沒有過不善業的果報。

original: Atthi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, atthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有不善業現有不善業的果報；

original: Atthi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, natthi akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有不善業現未有不善業的果報；

original: Atthi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有不善業將有不善業的果報；

original: Atthi akusalaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有不善業將沒有過不善業的果報。

original: Bhavissati akusalaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 將有不善業將有不善業的果報；

original: Bhavissati akusalaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati akusalassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 將有不善業將沒有不善業的果報。

original: Ahosi sāvajjaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi anavajjaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi kaṇhaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi sukkaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi sukhudrayaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi dukkhudrayaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi sukhavipākaṃ kammaṃ… pe… ahosi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, ahosi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有有罪業……（中略）既有無罪業……（中略）既有黑業……（中略）既有白業……（中略）既有生起樂的業……（中略）既有生起苦的業……（中略）既有樂果報業……（中略）既有苦果報業過去已有苦果報業的果報；

original: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, nāhosi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有苦果報業過去未有苦果報業的果報；

original: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, atthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有苦果報業現有苦果報業的果報；

original: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, natthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有苦果報業現未有苦果報業的果報；

original: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有苦果報業將有苦果報業的果報；

original: Ahosi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 既有苦果報業將沒有過苦果報業的果報。

original: Atthi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, atthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有苦果報業現有苦果報業的果報；

original: Atthi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, natthi dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有苦果報業現未有苦果報業的果報；

original: Atthi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有苦果報業將有苦果報業的果報；

original: Atthi dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 現有苦果報業將沒有過苦果報業的果報。

original: Bhavissati dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipāko.
content: 將有苦果報業將有苦果報業的果報；

original: Bhavissati dukkhavipākaṃ kammaṃ, na bhavissati dukkhavipākassa kammassa vipākoti.
content: 將有苦果報業將沒有苦果報業的果報。

original: Kammakathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 業的談論終了。
